textByHash.88f262caecfe4e19e4fb4db680fb09af7f211838: Didn't think I'd see you back down here . The elves are lucky to have you on their side.
textByHash.7198ee48535fa4d06a9da4afd7e1b43d3a1866a2: What an awful thought. Four dwarves, one a drunk, are the final hope against this darkness. I hope we don't let you down.
textByHash.50956abc1dcdb082c8c60683de8659e49a8f6198: Good day to you outsider. You should be careful down here. We're the only ones that haven't yet turned.
textByHash.c625446fcb59b3c872c0fe6c4cbc7065a6492daf: If you're not careful you'll become one of them too!
textByHash.6fd94b8b620bfea46a0e2c06dbd9b7d288e9ee6d: They're not followers, they're slaves, they're the soulless...
textByHash.ee39fa922b4e160a5a99a897da1e222759198edf: They were normal once, adventurers, treasure hunters. But men are weak, they couldn't ignore the voices.
textByHash.749183836d8483b58cf2af6b1b60955584b33de2: Now they all seem to think with one conscience... As if they're being controlled by one being...
textByHash.b515bee4ac90d4572086e6c986e7e17cf12fc1e8: Maybe... maybe Zamorak himself. Those who try and fight it are locked in cages, until their minds are too weak to resist.
textByHash.3d1302d0fbf18b481512ae1f36bf466f4e9a6ccd: Eventually they all fall to his control...
textByHash.9ca62908c5036263d8938655caf1fa1fdd6a7df2: Anyway, I have something that might help you. I crafted these to protect myself from the teeth of the soulless, their bite is vicious.
textByHash.ef9a3c110d322a676af93c051770928968939745: I haven't seen another pair which can withstand their jaws...
textByHash.ffe701f7df8bf9b8394163aa3881fc470bf0e81e: You think this is funny... Eh?
textByHash.a43e171b7529c99b97c84f30a0c96f225408f3cb: Traveller, I hear you plan to destroy Iban?
textByHash.afa53bc46bb5d8a9b44f6d6d76bc1e773989c2ec: I have a gift for you, they may help. I crafted these to protect myself from the teeth of the soulless, their bite is vicious.
textByHash.3abeb7b8b1713128300f70ce8e9dffc4ae1f629c: Good luck traveller, give Iban a slap for me!
textByHash.40e693b577087f232909e3979efff0e1671241ea: Hello again adventurer, so you're still around?
textByHash.298fbcfec0fb33692d683b94286f3ca80e1df616: Well..yes, but they're not cheap to make. I'll have to sell you a pair...
textByHash.739c2cf55afb9d58f01bab0c9bbbf11fb10340b8: We don't joke down here friend...
textByHash.e72465bdead4185f4d12d33bf71062b47ce8f1ac: Sorry, I can't sell them any cheaper than that.
textByHash.8a3d48be91da0473713cc7b18fb3729c1bee6604: There you go... I hope they help.
